backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that manages solar leads and user profiles, with admin-gated CRUD operations for leads and user-permission-gated profile management, using AccessControl and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two completed features: removing 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' sub-branding from all user-facing surfaces, and updating vendor selection text in SchemeInfo to reference 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' explicitly in all three languages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary document describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file across components, styles, hooks, and translations.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with the page title 'TRI-GITA SERVICES | BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (without 'A UNIT OF') and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the entire page in LanguageProvider and composes all section components (Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, Services, etc.) in order.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Dark navy banner section displaying bank finance stats (90% loan, 10% customer payment, 7-year tenure) sourced from translation keys, with a WhatsApp CTA button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating WhatsApp button component using the correct `t.floating.tooltip` translation key, with a pulse ring animation and hover tooltip.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer showing brand name and tagline (without any 'A unit of' line), contact details with clickable phone/email links, and a bottom copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll nav links, a language switcher (EN/HI/OD), a WhatsApp CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu that reacts to scroll position.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, tagline, WhatsApp and scheme CTA buttons, and three trust-stat cards.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead capture form that validates user inputs (name, phone, city, system size), submits the lead via a React Query mutation, and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Section displaying Odisha-specific solar subsidy tiers (1kW, 2kW, 3kW) with central and state subsidy breakdowns, animated into view via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Detailed section explaining the PM Surya Ghar scheme, covering benefits, eligibility, a four-phase application process with icons, and company differentiators.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Two-card grid showcasing residential and commercial solar services, each with an image, feature checklist, and a CTA button that scrolls to the inquiry form.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Renders a three-card warranty section with navy/gold/teal accent styles, displaying years, title, and description for each warranty tier using i18n translations.
Displays a styled CTA section with a WhatsApp link, phone number, and decorative elements, directing users to contact via WhatsApp using a hardcoded number.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a three-card 'Why Choose Us' section with navy/gold/teal accents, each card showing an icon, title, and description sourced from i18n translations.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active language ('en', 'hi', 'od'), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing it via a useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and exposing login/clear functions via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitLead mutation hook that submits lead form data to the ICP backend actor and invalidates the 'leads' query cache on success.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Contains the full i18n translation strings for English (and presumably Hindi/Odia) covering all UI sections including header, hero, scheme info, warranty, and more.
frontend/src/i18n/useTranslation.ts: Hook that returns the translation object for the currently active language by combining useLanguage context with the translations map.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using oklch colors, and declares keyframe animations (shimmer, pulse-ring, fade-in-up, accordion).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold/teal color palettes using oklch, custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations matching those in index.css.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the PM Surya Ghar Portal's version, existing implemented features (removing sub-branding text and updating vendor selection instructions), and configuration for clarification mode.
